form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 29-day let-up. Most recently won by 6 len at Coffs Harbour Cl1 March 9 over 1412m in the wet defeating Decadad carrying 56.5kg at $8. Before that 3rd of 8 at Coffs Harbour Cl1 on February 15 over 1400m, on a wet track; 5.5 len behind Kid Billy with 57kg at $4. Progressive gelding who can keep the winning momentum going.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up from last on the turn second last of 9 at this track Ctry Bm58 on January 25 over 1183m, 3.5 len behind La Cache A Vin with 58.5kg at $12. Second-up didn't finish the race at Beaudesert 0 - 60 March 12 over 1650m. Capable enough and keep safe from the low draw.

Second-up got back early 9th of 12 at Ipswich Bm60 on March 14 over 1350m, 5.5 len behind Cool Panels carrying 58kg at $101. Improver from the good barrier.

form.formComment: Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Port Macquarie Cg&E Cl1 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 1.75 len behind Patrioticintention carrying 57kg at $15. Before that sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 8 at Coffs Harbour Cl1 on March 9 over 1412m, on a wet track; 16 len behind Prince Of Prophets with 59kg at $5.50. Rates highly and doesn't have to improve much to win this.
